converters.name: browser2timesketch
converters.description: Browser history (Firefox/Chrome/Chromium/Edge SQLite databases) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: cloudtrail2timesketch
converters.description: AWS CloudTrail JSON/JSON.gz exports to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: cloudtrail2tracesignal
converters.description: AWS CloudTrail JSON/JSON.gz exports (file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: filterlog2timesketch
converters.description: pfSense/OPNsense filterlog firewall logs to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: filterlog2tracesignal
converters.description: pfSense/OPNsense filterlog firewall logs (plain or .gz, file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: journal2timesketch
converters.description: systemd journal (via journalctl JSON export) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: nginx2timesketch
converters.description: nginx access/error/redirect logs to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: nginx2tracesignal
converters.description: nginx access/error/redirect logs (plain or .gz, file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: pcap2timesketch
converters.description: Packet captures (pcap/pcapng) to Timesketch timeline, decoded to Ethernet/IPv4/IPv6/TCP/UDP/ICMP/ARP headers.

converters.name: pcap2tracesignal
converters.description: Packet captures (pcap/pcapng, file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload, decoded to Ethernet/IPv4/IPv6/TCP/UDP/ICMP/ARP headers. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: suricata2timesketch
converters.description: Suricata IDS/IPS logs (EVE JSON, fast.log, OPNsense syslog export) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: suricata2tracesignal
converters.description: Suricata IDS/IPS logs (EVE JSON, fast.log, OPNsense syslog export; plain or .gz, file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: timesketch2parquet
converters.description: Generic Timesketch-compatible CSV/JSONL (any column set, plain or .gz, file or directory) to a TraceSignal Parquet file for direct upload. Column requirements follow upstream google/timesketch's own import spec. Requires pyarrow.
